SEARCH

Package com.nib.commons.io

package com.nib.commons.io
Provides core Input/Output (I/O) components and abstractions for handling various file organizations and access methods.

This package includes classes and interfaces that model legacy and standard file systems, providing support for Sequential, VSAM, and GDG (Generation Data Group) file structures. It acts as a foundational layer for file operations within the application, specifically designed to facilitate the emulation and execution of legacy application I/O logic (e.g., COBOL) on the Java platform.

Key Components

  • AbstractFile - The base abstraction for file operations, handling common file attributes and state.
  • SequentialFile - Implementation for handling sequential file access and operations.
  • FileDescriptor - descriptors holding metadata about file properties and configuration.

System Streams

Interfaces for handling standard system input and output streams:
  • ISysIn - Interface for System Input operations.
  • ISysOut - Interface for System Output operations.
  • ISysLog - Interface for System Logging operations.

File Attributes and Definitions

Enumerations and classes defining file characteristics:
  • FileOrganization - Defines the organization of the file (e.g., SEQUENTIAL, INDEXED).
  • RecordFormat - Defines the format of records within a file (e.g., FIXED, VARIABLE).
  • Disposition - Defines the file disposition status (e.g., NEW, SHR, MOD).
  • OpenMode - Defines the mode in which a file is opened (e.g., INPUT, OUTPUT, I-O).
  • Related Packages
    Package
    Description
    com.nib.commons
    Common utilities and core runtime components for the NIB application framework.
    com.nib.commons.io.cache
    Provides caching mechanisms for I/O operations.
    com.nib.commons.io.catalog
    Provides catalog management mechanisms for I/O operations.
    com.nib.commons.io.exceptions
    Provides exception classes for I/O operations.
    com.nib.commons.io.tools
    Provides command-line tools and utilities for file system operations.
    com.nib.commons.io.vsam
    Provides classes and interfaces for emulating VSAM (Virtual Storage Access Method) file organizations.
  • Class
    Description
    AbstractFile
    Represents an abstract file with various operations for file handling and record management.
    Advancing
    Represents the carriage control or advancing logic for record output, often associated with printer files or COBOL `WRITE ...
    CatalogEntryCustomizer
    A customization registry for FileDescriptor objects.
    CatalogEntryType
    Enumerates the different types of entries that can exist within a catalog, typically reflecting VSAM (Virtual Storage Access Method) or related mainframe dataset structures.
    ConsoleSysio
    Console based SYSIN, SYSOUT and SYSLOG implementation
    Conversion
    Defines the types of character set conversions available for input/output operations.
    Dd
    Data Definition (DD) representing a dataset or file resource.
    Dd.Builder
    Builder for Dd instances.
    Disposition
    Disposition of the dataset.
    DummyFile
    Represents a dummy file.
    EncodingType
    Enumeration representing character encoding types.
    FileAttributes
    Attributes defining the properties and behavior of a file.
    FileDescriptor
    Describes the file characteristics
    FileIOResponse
    I/O operation response
    FileIOResponse.ConditionDelegate
    Represents a delegate interface designed to execute specific logic in response to a condition raised during file operations.
    FileOrganization
    Represents the organization of a file.
    FileStatus
    Represents file status codes indicating the result of an I/O operation.
    GdgVersion
    Represents a generation data group (GDG) version with attributes to handle specific version numbers or wildcard indications.
    IFileDefinitionHandler
    This interface defines methods for handling and managing file descriptors (DD) associated with job steps in a system.
    ISequentialAPI
    This interface defines a sequential I/O API for performing basic file or resource operations such as opening, reading, writing, flushing, and closing resources.
    ISysIn
    ISysIn is an interface designed for handling input operations.
    ISysLog
    Interface defining methods for logging messages to a system log (SYSLOG).
    ISysOut
    Represents a system output handler interface for writing messages to SYSOUT.
    LineReader
     
    LockMode
    Represents the locking mode for file operations.
    MicroFocusFileHeader
    Represents the header of a Micro Focus data file, encapsulating information such as header data, organization, recording mode, maximum record length, and minimum record length.
    OpenMode
    The OpenMode enum represents various modes of access for a given resource.
    Record
    A class representing a record with a configurable memory structure and length.
    RecordAlreadyAllocatedException
    This exception is thrown to indicate that an attempt was made to allocate a record that has already been allocated.
    RecordFormat
    An enumeration representing various record formats.
    SequentialFile
    The SequentialFile class represents a file that handles sequential access operations.
    Sysout
    Represents a system output (sysout) object containing relevant metadata and utilities for processing job-related outputs.
    VariableFormatType
    Enum VariableFormatType represents variable format types with associated string values.
